# Linkbeam

> Open-source, self-hosted music smartlinks and pre-release pages on Cloudflare Workers — edge-rendered fan pages, first-party Meta CAPI, and campaign analytics for label operators.

Linkbeam is not an npm library you import. You clone the repo, bind your Cloudflare account (D1, KV, R2, Queues), and deploy a Worker. Fans hit `/:slug`; outbound clicks go through `/out/:slug/:platform` with server-side tracking.

## Docs

- [AI integration prompt](https://derpcatmusic.github.io/linkbeam/ai.html): Copy-paste prompt for Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Copilot
- [Home](https://derpcatmusic.github.io/linkbeam/): Marketing landing and live demo
- [Getting started](https://derpcatmusic.github.io/linkbeam/getting-started.html): Install, Cloudflare resources, migrations, deploy
- [Configuration](https://derpcatmusic.github.io/linkbeam/configuration.html): wrangler.jsonc bindings, vars, secrets, routes
- [Admin workflow](https://derpcatmusic.github.io/linkbeam/admin.html): Import tracks, publish pre-release/live links, analytics
- [Meta tracking](https://derpcatmusic.github.io/linkbeam/tracking.html): Pixel, CAPI, cookies, event pipeline, troubleshooting

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://derpcatmusic.github.io/linkbeam/llms-full.txt): Full docs bundle for one-shot agent context
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/DerpcatMusic/linkbeam): Source code, issues, MIT license
- [Live demo](https://links.dolmengatemedia.com/demo): Example smartlink on a production deploy
